---
title: "Valeria Fierros"
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/valeriafierros/valeriafierros.github.io
    - text: Email
      href: valeriafierros@ucsb.edu
---
